## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Scope

- Which files or folders were intentionally changed?
- Was this docs-only, template-only, or behavior-affecting?

## Checks

- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_unity_gameplay.py`
- [ ] Kept guidance understandable for beginners
- [ ] Kept hooks and CI lightweight
- [ ] Avoided unrelated file changes

## Notes For Reviewers

- Anything risky, noisy, or still undecided?
- Any part that downstream Unity projects may need to customize?
